prompt: Make it look like a "natural photo casually taken by a friend on a smartphone". "Prioritize natural facial balance for a real person, avoiding excessive shrinking of the face or enlarging of the eyes". "Don't over-arrange the composition; make it a snapshot with slight irregularities in angles and margins".
promptEn: Make it look like a "natural photo casually taken by a friend on a smartphone". "Prioritize natural facial balance for a real person, avoiding excessive shrinking of the face or enlarging of the eyes". "Don't over-arrange the composition; make it a snapshot with slight irregularities in angles and margins".
promptZh: 使其看起来像“由朋友用智能手机随意拍摄的自然照片”。“{argument name="facial balance" default="优先考虑真实人物的自然面部比例，避免过度缩小脸部或放大眼睛”}”。“{argument name="composition" default="不要过度安排构图；将其制作成一张在角度和留白上略有不规则的快照”}”。
